title: CazCreate
description: A Create focused modpack made specifically for the CazCreate Minecraft server
body:
# CazCreate
WARNING ABOUT 2.0.0 We are actively working on 2.0.0 and its in a alpha stage. This means most of the Art and information on this page will be for the 2.0.0 release and this will be removed once the 2.0.0 release has reached the stable branch.
**A Create-focused modpack designed for optimal quality of life, accessibility, and performance.** **Note:** Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/kv3jKuPW9F) to discuss the CazCreate Minecraft server, this modpack, or related topics. *This modpack was originally crafted for the CazCreate Minecraft server,however its available for all to enjoy!* ## Mod List Below is a entire modlist with their respected authors.

## Installation Instructions **Requirements:** - Minecraft Java Edition - [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) or a Modrinth compatible launcher of your choice **Steps:** 1. Search for "CazCreate" within the app. 2. Click on the modpack and select "Install." 3. Launch Minecraft through the Modrinth App and enjoy! *For manual installation or use with other launchers, refer to the [Modrinth Modpack Format](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth) documentation.* ## Support and Community For assistance, updates, and community interaction, join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/kv3jKuPW9F). ## Credits and Permissions All included mods are used in compliance with their respective licenses. For more information on modpack permissions, refer to Modrinth's [modpack permissions guidelines](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8797527-obtaining-modpack-permissions). However if content in this pack was made or licensed by you, and you like it to be removed, feel free to reach out and we can resolve the issue ASAP.
